message.content:
@startuml
participant "record" as record

participant "configuration" as configuration

participant "ekf" as ekf

participant "pathgenerator" as pathgenerator

participant "display" as display

participant "diagnostics" as diagnostics

participant "record" as record2

sequenceDiagram
    participant "record" as actor

    actor actor
    actor->>configuration: 1 Get initial configuration

    rect initialize
        actor->>ekf: 2 Create Object
        actor->>pathgenerator: 3 Create Object
    end

    rect iterate
        actor->>ekf: 4 Get current location
        actor->>pathgenerator: 5 Send current location
        pathgenerator-->>actor: 6 Return path
        actor->>display: 7 Path addition and walker location
        actor->>diagnostics: 8 Walker location and path status
    end

    note right of actor
        record
    end

    note right of configuration
        configuration
    end

    note right of ekf
        ekf
    end

    note right of pathgenerator
        pathgenerator
    end

    note right of display
        display
    end

    note right of diagnostics
        diagnostics
    end

    record2->>configuration: 1 Get initial configuration
    configuration->>record2: 2 Create Object
    record2->>pathgenerator: 3 Create Object
    pathgenerator-->>record2: 4 Get current location
    record2->>pathgenerator: 5 Send current location
    pathgenerator-->>record2: 6 Return path
    record2->>display: 7 Path addition and walker location
    display->>diagnostics: 8 Walker location and path status

@enduml
